chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2604 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For order as to non-prosecution..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.08.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks post-arrest bail in FIR No.636 of 2025 under Section 93(b), SCNS Act, 2022 registered at Police Station Zaman Town. Now the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government and proviso for grant of bail is inserted and it is only pending required assent of the Governor, therefore, the petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach the learned trial Court/Special Tribunal/or competent Court, as the case may be, under the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025 for his appropriate relief. Under such circumstances, the instant petition is disposed of; however, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
